de.uka.ilkd.key.smt

Interface SMTSolver

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    SMTSolverImplementation

    public interface SMTSolver
    The SMTSolver interface represents a solver process (e.g. Z3, Simplify,...) on the KeY side. It is used to store information about an instance of a process and its result. A object of SMTSolver is, therefore, related to exactly one object of typ SMTProblem. Each object of SMTSolver has a specific solver type (SolverType), e.g SolverType.Z3Solver.
    Note:
    A class that implements this interface should be thread safe since there methods are accessed by different threads concurrently.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static class  SMTSolver.ReasonOfInterruption 
      static class  SMTSolver.SolverState
      A solver process can have differnt states.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Throwable getException()
      If there has occurred an exception while executing the solver process, the method returns this exceptions, otherwise null
      Collection<Throwable> getExceptionsOfTacletTranslation()
      Returns the exceptions that has been thrown while translating taclets into assumptions.
      SMTSolverResult getFinalResult()
      Returns the result of the execution.
      SMTProblem getProblem()
      Returns the SMT Problem that is connected to this solver process.
      SMTSolver.ReasonOfInterruption getReasonOfInterruption()
      Returns the reason of the interruption: see ReasonOfInterruption.
      AbstractSolverSocket getSocket() 
      String getSolverOutput()
      Returns the solver output without any change.
      long getStartTime()
      Returns the system time when the solver was started.
      SMTSolver.SolverState getState()
      Returns the current state of the solver.
      TacletSetTranslation getTacletTranslation()
      Returns the taclet translation that is used as assumptions.
      long getTimeout()
      Returns the amount of milliseconds after a timeout occurs.
      String getTranslation()
      Returns the translation of the SMTProblem that is handed over to the solver process.
      SolverType getType()
      Returns the type of the solver process.
      void interrupt(SMTSolver.ReasonOfInterruption reasonOfInterruption)
      Use this method in order to interrupt a running solver process.
      boolean isRunning()
      Returns true if the solver process is running else false.
      String name()
      Returns the name of the solver.
      boolean wasInterrupted()
      Returns true if the solver process was interrupted by an user, an exception or a timeout.

    • Method Detail

      • name

        String name()
        Returns the name of the solver.

      • getTranslation

        String getTranslation()
        Returns the translation of the SMTProblem that is handed over to the solver process. If the solver process is still running the method returns null in order to maintain thread safety.
        Returns:
        String representation of the corresponding problem, if the solver process is not running, otherwise null.

      • getTacletTranslation

        TacletSetTranslation getTacletTranslation()
        Returns the taclet translation that is used as assumptions. If the solver process is still running the method returns null in order to maintain thread safety.

      • getType

        SolverType getType()
        Returns the type of the solver process.

      • getProblem

        SMTProblem getProblem()
        Returns the SMT Problem that is connected to this solver process. If the solver process is still running the method returns null in order to maintain thread safety.

      • getException

        Throwable getException()
        If there has occurred an exception while executing the solver process, the method returns this exceptions, otherwise null

      • interrupt

        void interrupt(SMTSolver.ReasonOfInterruption reasonOfInterruption)
        Use this method in order to interrupt a running solver process.
        Parameters:
        reasonOfInterruption - The reason of interruption. Can only be set to ReasonOfInterruption.Timeout or ReasonOfInterruption.User other wise a IllegalArgumentException is thrown.

      • getStartTime

        long getStartTime()
        Returns the system time when the solver was started. (in ms)

      • getTimeout

        long getTimeout()
        Returns the amount of milliseconds after a timeout occurs. (in ms)

      • getState

        SMTSolver.SolverState getState()
        Returns the current state of the solver. Possible values are
        Waiting<\code>: The solver process is waiting for the start signal
        Running<\code>: The solver process is running Stopped<\code>: The solver process was stopped. The reason can be a user interruption, an exception, a timeout or a successfull run.

      • wasInterrupted

        boolean wasInterrupted()
        Returns true if the solver process was interrupted by an user, an exception or a timeout. In all other cases (including that the solver is still running) the method returns true.

      • isRunning

        boolean isRunning()
        Returns true if the solver process is running else false.

      • getReasonOfInterruption

        SMTSolver.ReasonOfInterruption getReasonOfInterruption()
        Returns the reason of the interruption: see ReasonOfInterruption.

      • getFinalResult

        SMTSolverResult getFinalResult()
        Returns the result of the execution. If the solver process is still running the method returns a result object that represents the result 'unknown'.

      • getSolverOutput

        String getSolverOutput()
        Returns the solver output without any change. The format is: " Normal Output: ... Error Output: ... Exit Code: ... "

      • getExceptionsOfTacletTranslation

        Collection<Throwable> getExceptionsOfTacletTranslation()
        Returns the exceptions that has been thrown while translating taclets into assumptions.

      • getSocket

        AbstractSolverSocket getSocket()
